name: pencil-atelier
description: Library-agnostic design-quality toolkit for Pencil (.pen) files and any companion codebase. Enforces a universal 4px-grid sizing scale, variable-first design tokens, and component extraction at the second repetition - independent of CSS framework. Ships three read-only subagents (`pencil-auditor` for quality enforcement, `pencil-navigator` for token-efficient localization inside dense .pen files, `pencil-analyzer` for semantic-brief extraction), a `/pencil-analyze` command that persists a `design.md` brief from an existing .pen, a `/pencil-design` command that authors new designs under the rules (consulting design.md when present), a `/pencil-audit` command that validates existing designs and code, and a `/pencil-to-code` command that transpiles designs to code; the latter auto-detects Tailwind CSS in the target project and uses its class mapping when present, falling back to raw pixel values from the design otherwise.
